_comment: INTENTIONAL TEST DATA. Each entry below trips a different ValidationReport category so the end-of-load summary lists every kind: duplicate id, unknown kind, unknown template, unknown field, coercion failure. The dangling-reference category is covered by 'sampledata_does_not_exist' in a_thief_class.json; the malformed-file category by broken.json. None of these register; they only prove fault isolation never blocks the good entries.

entries.displayName: Duplicate id (same as proficiencies.json -> error, second skipped)
